violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving throughout retail area has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The hand-washing sink in the ware-washing area and prep area were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024

Self-serve food items (Tornados, pizza, breakfast sandwiches, and empanadas) were observed with no label information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment has a sign requesting customers to inquire about ingredients. Per person in charge, they are in the process of making a binder of label information for food items. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
